name: context-pack
description: Repo-local source evidence and handoff context for coding agents.

interface.shortDescription: Route agents to bounded repo evidence.
interface.longDescription: Context Pack gives coding agents a lightweight repo-local map, confidence-labeled source evidence, and base-safe review context before broad reading. An explicit transient preview does not modify the repository; setup adds versioned area notes and handoff state for work that moves across sessions, agents, machines, or worktrees.
defaultPrompt: Fix a bug from focused repo context.
Review this branch without rereading the whole repo.
Debug a red CI build from the right files.
Leave this work easy to resume later.
